meta.title: 美学与崇高
meta.description: Native-level aesthetic discourse on beauty and the sublime in Chinese: idioms, classical rhetorical patterns, formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 원어민 수준의 미학과 숭고 담화: 성어, 고전적 수사 문형, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「崇高」(chónggāo) in aesthetics refers to "the sublime", an overwhelming greatness that inspires awe mixed with a sense of one's own smallness.
explanation.ko: 「崇高」(chónggāo)는 미학에서 압도적인 위대함으로 경외와 자신의 왜소함을 동시에 느끼게 하는 '숭고'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「崇高」在美学中是什么意思？(What does 崇高 mean in aesthetics?)
choices: 崇高(the sublime — an overwhelming, awe-inspiring greatness)

explanation.en: 「美感」(měigǎn) means "aesthetic sense", the perception and experience of beauty.
explanation.ko: 「美感」(měigǎn)는 아름다움을 지각하고 체험하는 '미적 감각'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「美感」是什么意思？(What does 美感 mean?)
choices: 对美的感知与体验(the perception and experience of beauty)

explanation.en: 「震撼人心」is an idiom meaning "to strongly move the heart, bringing profound emotional impact".
explanation.ko: 「震撼人心」는 '마음을 깊이 뒤흔들며 강렬한 정서적 충격을 준다'는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「震撼人心」是什么意思？(What does 震撼人心 mean?)
choices: 强烈地触动人的内心，带来深刻的情感冲击(strongly touching one's heart, bringing a profound emotional impact)

explanation.en: 「余音绕梁」is an idiom describing music so beautiful that its resonance seems to linger long after it ends.
explanation.ko: 「余音绕梁」는 음악이 너무 아름다워 그 여운이 오래도록 감도는 듯하다는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「余音绕梁」是什么意思？(What does 余音绕梁 mean?)
choices: 形容音乐美妙，令人回味无穷，仿佛余音久久萦绕(describing music so beautiful that its echo seems to linger long after)

explanation.en: This view describes art movements that deliberately break traditional aesthetics to find beauty in seemingly ugly elements.
explanation.ko: 이 관점은 전통 미학을 의도적으로 깨고 추해 보이는 요소에서 독특한 미적 가치를 발견하는 예술 사조를 설명한다.

questions.prompt: 「以丑为美」的美学观点通常指什么？(What does the aesthetic view of 以丑为美 usually refer to?)
choices: 某些艺术流派刻意打破传统审美，从看似丑陋或不和谐的元素中发掘独特的美学价值(certain art movements deliberately break from traditional aesthetics, finding unique aesthetic value in seemingly ugly or discordant elements)
坚持传统审美标准不容挑战

explanation.en: 「崇高」means "the sublime".
explanation.ko: 「崇高」는 '숭고함'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 站在悬崖边俯瞰无垠的深渊，人往往会油然而生一种___之感，既敬畏又震撼。(Standing at the edge of a cliff looking down into a boundless abyss, people often spontaneously feel a sense of the sublime, both awed and shaken.)

explanation.en: 「美感」means "aesthetic sense".
explanation.ko: 「美感」는 '미적 감각'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 每个人对艺术作品的___不尽相同，这正是审美主观性的体现。(Everyone's aesthetic sense toward works of art is not entirely the same, which is precisely a manifestation of the subjectivity of aesthetic judgment.)

explanation.en: 「震撼人心」means "deeply moving/impactful".
explanation.ko: 「震撼人心」는 '마음을 깊이 뒤흔들다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这部交响乐的高潮部分气势恢宏，令在场的每一位听众都感到___。(The climax of this symphony is magnificent in scale, striking every listener present with a profound emotional impact.)

explanation.en: 「余音绕梁」describes lingering, beautiful music.
explanation.ko: 「余音绕梁」는 여운이 감도는 아름다운 음악을 묘사한다.

questions.prompt: 这段旋律如此优美动人，散场之后依然___，久久无法忘怀。(This melody is so beautiful and moving that even after the performance ended, its echo lingered long, unforgettable.)

explanation.en: This describes finding aesthetic value in unconventional forms.
explanation.ko: 이는 비전통적 형태에서 미적 가치를 발견하는 것을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 一些当代艺术家秉持___的理念，试图在看似荒诞粗粝的表达中揭示更深层的真实。(Some contemporary artists uphold the aesthetic concept of "finding beauty in ugliness," attempting to reveal deeper truths through seemingly absurd, rough forms of expression.)
choices: 某些艺术流派刻意打破传统审美，从看似丑陋或不和谐的元素中发掘独特的美学价值
坚持传统审美标准不容挑战

explanation.en: 「揭示」means "to reveal".
explanation.ko: 「揭示」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 康德关于崇高的论述___了美与崇高这两种审美体验之间微妙而深刻的区别。(Kant's discourse on the sublime revealed the subtle yet profound distinction between the two aesthetic experiences of beauty and the sublime.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味追求表面的精致华美，___不如深入探索能够触动灵魂的崇高之美。(Rather than blindly pursuing superficial exquisiteness, it's better to deeply explore sublime beauty that can touch the soul.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这件艺术品___形式极为简约朴素，___蕴含的精神力量却足以震撼每一位观者的心灵。(Even though this work of art is extremely minimalist and plain in form, the spiritual power it contains is enough to shake the soul of every viewer.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 崇高之美之所以能够超越单纯的视觉愉悦，___是因为它往往伴随着对个体渺小与自然伟力的深刻体认。(The reason sublime beauty can transcend mere visual pleasure is precisely because it is often accompanied by a profound realization of individual smallness and nature's overwhelming power.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一件艺术作品一旦触及了人类共通的审美体验，___能够超越时代与文化的隔阂，引发广泛共鸣。(Once a work of art touches on aesthetic experiences common to all humanity, it can transcend barriers of era and culture, resonating widely.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，崇高美学所揭示的___在于人类在面对浩瀚宇宙时那种敬畏与超越的复杂情感。(In the final analysis, what sublime aesthetics reveal still lies in the complex emotions of awe and transcendence that humans feel when facing the vast universe.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，艺术家的创造力与观者的想象力___成就了一场深刻的审美体验。(From this we can see that both the artist's creativity and the viewer's imagination jointly bring about a profound aesthetic experience.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，真正伟大的艺术作品___能够超越纯粹的感官愉悦，触及更深层的精神境界。(As everyone knows, truly great works of art are often able to transcend pure sensory pleasure, touching a deeper spiritual realm.)

explanation.en: 「岂仅是〜」is a classical-style rhetorical construction.
explanation.ko: 「岂仅是〜」는 고전적 반어 구문이다.

questions.prompt: 这幅画作所传达的震撼，岂___视觉层面的冲击，实则触及了观者对生命本身的深刻感悟。(The shock conveyed by this painting is by no means merely a visual-level impact, but truly touches the viewer's profound realization about life itself.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 崇高之美与优美之美___源于人类不同的心理机制，前者伴随敬畏，后者伴随愉悦。(The beauty of the sublime and the beauty of the graceful often stem from different psychological mechanisms in humans; the former is accompanied by awe, the latter by pleasure.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 深入探索〜: 不如深入探索 (not 深入不如探索).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '深入探索〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如深入探索'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味追求表面的精致华美，深入不如探索能够触动灵魂的崇高之美。(Rather than blindly pursuing superficial exquisiteness, it's better to deeply explore sublime beauty that can touch the soul.) — find the error
choices: 与其一味追求表面的精致华美，不如深入探索能够触动灵魂的崇高之美。
与其一味追求表面的精致华美，深入不如探索能够触动灵魂的崇高之美。
与其一味追求表面的精致华美，不如探索深入能够触动灵魂的崇高之美。
与其一味追求表面的精致华美，深入探索不如能够触动灵魂的崇高之美。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 崇高之美之所以能够超越单纯的视觉愉悦，因为是它往往伴随着对个体渺小与自然伟力的深刻体认。(The reason sublime beauty can transcend mere visual pleasure is precisely because it is often accompanied by a profound realization of individual smallness and nature's overwhelming power.) — find the error
choices: 崇高之美之所以能够超越单纯的视觉愉悦，是因为它往往伴随着对个体渺小与自然伟力的深刻体认。
崇高之美之所以能够超越单纯的视觉愉悦，因为是它往往伴随着对个体渺小与自然伟力的深刻体认。
崇高之美之所以能够超越单纯的视觉愉悦，是它因为往往伴随着对个体渺小与自然伟力的深刻体认。
崇高之美之所以能够超越单纯的视觉愉悦，它是因为往往伴随着对个体渺小与自然伟力的深刻体认。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一件艺术作品一旦触及了人类共通的审美体验，能够才超越时代与文化的隔阂，引发广泛共鸣。(Once a work of art touches on aesthetic experiences common to all humanity, it can transcend barriers of era and culture, resonating widely.) — find the error
choices: 一件艺术作品一旦触及了人类共通的审美体验，就能够超越时代与文化的隔阂，引发广泛共鸣。
一件艺术作品一旦触及了人类共通的审美体验，能够才超越时代与文化的隔阂，引发广泛共鸣。
一件艺术作品一旦触及了人类共通的审美体验，才能够超越时代与文化的隔阂，引发广泛共鸣。
一件艺术作品一旦触及了人类共通的审美体验，能够超越才时代与文化的隔阂，引发广泛共鸣。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其一味追求表面的精致华美，不如深入探索能够触动灵魂的崇高之美 ("Rather than blindly pursuing superficial exquisiteness, it's better to deeply explore sublime beauty that can touch the soul").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其一味追求表面的精致华美，不如深入探索能够触动灵魂的崇高之美' (표면적인 화려함만 좇느니 차라리 영혼을 울릴 수 있는 숭고한 아름다움을 깊이 탐구하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味追求表面的精致华美，__________能够触动灵魂的崇高之美。(Rather than blindly pursuing superficial exquisiteness, it's better to deeply explore sublime beauty that can touch the soul.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一件艺术作品一旦触及了人类共通的审美体验，就能够超越时代与文化的隔阂 ("Once a work of art touches on aesthetic experiences common to all humanity, it can transcend barriers of era and culture").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一件艺术作品一旦触及了人类共通的审美体验，就能够超越时代与文化的隔阂' (예술 작품은 일단 인류 공통의 미적 체험을 건드리면 시대와 문화의 장벽을 초월할 수 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一件艺术作品一旦触及了人类共通的审美体验，__________超越时代与文化的隔阂。(Once a work of art touches on aesthetic experiences common to all humanity, it can transcend barriers of era and culture.)
